title: saxifraga fortunei var. glabra
intro: Saxifraga fortunei var. glabra is a variety of the Fortune's saxifrage plant, a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family, which is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as promoting digestion and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Saxifraga fortunei var. glabra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make a variety of medicinal remedies.
